goals: Each God class file reduced to ≤500 lines

stories.title: Fix null-aware operator bugs
acceptanceCriteria: All `?.` on non-nullable expressions replaced with `.`
flutter analyze reports 0 warnings
stories.technicalNotes: Focus on collection_screen.dart first, then other files. Use patch tool.

stories.title: Remove dead code
acceptanceCriteria: Dart analysis server shows 0 warnings on all modified files
No orphan widget files remain in lib/screens/
Extracted reusable widgets into lib/widgets/ or subdirectories
stories.technicalNotes: Extract standalone classes, remove unused imports. Use `dart fix` where possible.
edgeCases: Some widgets may be used dynamically (e.g., via builder) — double-check
Commented-out code in long files (collection_screen, dashboard)

stories.title: Add const constructors
acceptanceCriteria: All StatelessWidget classes have const constructors
All const-eligible `build()` calls use const
flutter analyze reports 0 missing-const warnings
stories.technicalNotes: Add `const` keyword and `super.key` to constructor parameters.

stories.title: Extract match_provider.dart
acceptanceCriteria: match_provider.dart split into focused sub-files under lib/providers/match/
Each file under 300 lines
flutter analyze reports 0 issues on all match provider files
stories.technicalNotes: Extract: match state machine, match creation logic, live match logic, match history. The file is likely 800+ lines.
edgeCases: Existing widget imports must continue working

stories.title: Extract dashboard_screen.dart
acceptanceCriteria: dashboard_screen.dart reduced from 2,063 lines to under 150 lines
lib/screens/dashboard/ contains focused widget files
All imports use barrel files (constants.dart, theme.dart, providers.dart)
flutter analyze reports 0 issues on all dashboard files
stories.technicalNotes: Extract: HeroHeader, FeaturedCardSection, QuickActionsSection, RecentMatchesSection, DailyObjectivesSection, PackHighlightsSection, StatChip, SeasonTierBadge, DailyRewardButton, MiniStat, QuickActionCard, ActionTile, RecentMatchTile, PackTile.
edgeCases: Circular imports — ensure dashboard widgets don't import back to dashboard_screen
Private `_` prefixed classes must become public when extracted

stories.title: Unit tests for match provider
acceptanceCriteria: 18 passing tests covering all model constructors, getters, and helpers
Tests cover: hasActiveMatch, homeScore, copyWith, ballsRemaining, strikeRate, economy, resultText, inn1Score, innings ordering

stories.title: API service layer
acceptanceCriteria: lib/core/api_config.dart contains URL configuration facade
lib/services/match_api_service.dart extracts match-related REST calls
lib/services/match_state_machine.dart defines match phase transitions
All backend URLs routed through AppConfig.backendUrl
stories.technicalNotes: Hardcoded Supabase/LocalMultiplayer URLs in widgets should reference AppConfig.
edgeCases: SupabaseService has its own client — don't break existing auth flows
Local Multiplayer backend has different endpoints
